setpoint_narrative: Make the cybernetic evolution layer usable as Misa's official structure reference, local precheck layer, and dry-run learning-loop simulator without changing live runtime behavior.
acceptance: Misa integration profile blocks timers, session mechanics, provider routes, public posting, deletion, and persistent memory publication.
sampling_plan: Run local repository checks against the v0.2 scaffold before any Misa runtime integration work.
recovery_target: Revert to documentation-only reference by removing the integration profile or restoring the previous repository tag.
rollback_trigger: Any live-effect flag becomes true, any blocked surface is removed, or precheck fails.
constraints: Do not change Discord or Farcaster session mechanics.
Do not write persistent memory or publish skills automatically.
coupling_notes: The profile may guide future Misa adapter design but does not attach to live services.
approximation_validity: Local dry-run checks prove only repository consistency, route behavior, and boundary consistency; they do not prove live production safety.
risks: Overstating readiness as production runtime approval
Future adapter accidentally adding live effects without a new contract
